title: Living in Boulder Vlog 4 - 23 - 2016 Late upload

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a wide-ranging life update from Boulder in April 2016, covering his squamous cell skin cancer surgery results, a replacement MacBook Pro, frustrating data losses in a Google Earth historical mapping project, a new marijuana preparation method, a drunken video he regrets, and his inability to get a Walmart stocking job because he's a cannabis user. He also riffs on Boulder's prohibition history and Denver's wild-west saloon era.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: saving with date and time-to-the-minute is the only way to prevent data loss from the app conjuring old versions
weed legalization will naturally drive down alcohol consumption; liquor stores will dry up

stances.topic: listening to audio books while cycling
stances.position: it should remain legal — it's a perfect complement to riding and shouldn't be banned
embarrassed by it; it wasn't the video he intended to make
frustrated he can't get hired because he's a stoner; considers it a perfect job for him
alcohol is poison; weed is the modern equivalent of what alcohol was in the 1800s wild west
Boulder was first to prohibit alcohol and is now pioneering legal weed — a modern wild west parallel
